title: Levington Tomorite Concentrated Tomato Food 1.3L
features: Our products are designed with durability and functionality in mind, so you can trust that they'll last.
description: Product description Generic - We are committed to providing reliable, quality products, which offer great value for money. Our aim is to ensure all of our high-quality products meet the expectations of our customers. Directions [Dilute X mL of concentrate in Y L of water] Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Do not ingest. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and direct sunlight. Always wear gloves and protective clothing when handling. Do not apply in windy conditions to avoid drift and potential harm to nearby plants or the environment. Always follow the dilution instructions on the product label. Manufacturer Contact Information Evergreen Garden Care UK Ltd., 1 Archipelago, Lyon Way, Frimley, Surrey, GU16 7ER, United Kingdom.
